name: app-store-review
description: Evaluates code against Apple's App Store Review Guidelines for iOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and visionOS apps.

interface.shortDescription: Audit apps for App Store review risk
interface.longDescription: Evaluate app code against Apple's App Store Review Guidelines before submission, with coverage for privacy, payments, safety, performance, design, and legal risks.
defaultPrompt: Review this app for App Store compliance.
